description: Memory consolidation pass. memory-processor curates persistent project memory into .xtrm/memory.md. Use after many closed runs or when stale/contradictory memories accumulate (e.g., post-epic completion). Single specialist, writes memory summary only.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: persistent project memory has accumulated stale, redundant, or contradictory entries. Reason: {{trigger_reason}}.
SCOPE: .xtrm/memory.md + bd memories (project-scope).
NON_GOALS: no code edits; no bd issue edits; no specialist edits; no removal of memories that are still relevant (only consolidate / dedupe / archive stale).
VALIDATION: memory.md is current, dedupe'd, contradictions resolved. Bulk-export pre-script runs before specialist starts.
ACCEPTANCE: future sessions read consolidated memory and pick up relevant context faster.

Memory hygiene chain — curates persistent memory.

steps.title: memory-processor:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: curate persistent project memory. Dedupe duplicates; consolidate related memories; archive stale (older than relevance window without recent reference); resolve contradictions (newest-wins unless explicitly marked); update .xtrm/memory.md with the consolidated summary.
INPUTS: bd memories (full list, JSON); current .xtrm/memory.md; recent activity surface (which memories were referenced recently).
OUTPUTS: edited .xtrm/memory.md with consolidated summary; structured report of: dedupe count, consolidate count, archive count, contradictions resolved. Optionally: list of bd kv keys to forget.
SCOPE: .xtrm/memory.md + memory-processor's own bd queries.
NON_GOALS: no code edits; no bd issue edits; no memories removed without explicit archive reason.
